references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Juncaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 210-215
Jansen, ME. 1978. Notes on Luzula (Juncaceae) in Malesia, Tasmania, and Australia. Blumea 24: 527-532
Snogerup, S, PF Zika & J Kirschner. 2002. Taxonomic and nomenclatural notes on Juncus. Preslia 74: 247-266
Wilson, KL & LAS Johnson. 2001. The genus Juncus (Juncaceae) in Malesia and allied septate-leaved species in adjoining regions. Telopea 9: 357-397

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 4 November 2017

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 328 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 201; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 212; Type: from Europe.
species.notes: Circumboreal, in the tropics confined to the montane regions; probably not native in Philippines (Wilson & Johnson 2001). Along bridle trails in the mossy forest, 1900m.

species.citation: (Buchenau) Nakai , Veg. Kamikochi (1928) 35 ; Wilson & Johnson, Telopea 9 (2001) 374; ≡ Juncus effusus var. decipiens Buchenau , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 12 (1890) 229. ssp. medianus L.A.S.Johnson & K.L.Wilson, Telopea 9 (2001) 377. Distribution: Borneo, Java, New Guinea, Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO: Davao. Native.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, E Asia, India, Japan, Korea, Laos, New Guinea, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand. LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO: Davao, MINDORO.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 326 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 201; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 211.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Philippines, Sumatra. LUZON, MINDANAO: Cotabato (photos).
species.notes: Throughout the temperate zones (especially in N hemisphere), in the tropics confined to montane zone, not in Australia; wet places, pools, lake borders, 1400-3000m, locally abundant.

species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 259 ; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 213. ssp. leschenaultii (J.Gay ex Laharpe) Kirschner, Preslia 74 (2002) 249; ≡ Juncus prismatocarpus var. lechenaultii (J.Gay ex Laharpe) Buchenau, Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 6 (1885) 137; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 201; ≡ Juncus leschenaultii J.Gay ex Laharpe, Essai Monogr. Jonc. (1825) 49; Type: from India. Distribution: Australia, Java, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, New Zealand, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra. LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO. Native.
species.distribution: Australia, Java, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, New Zealand, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra. LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO, MINDORO.

genera.last_edited: Edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 29 October 2016

species.citation: Buchenau , Krit. Verz. Juncac. (1879) 88 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 202; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 214. var. effusa. Distribution: Borneo, China, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. Native.

M.E.Jansen , Blumea 24 (1978) 530; Type: Clemens 17127 (B, holo; L, UC, iso). ≠ Luzula campestris var. australasica auct. non (Steud.) Buchenau ; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 215; Merr., EPFP 1 (1922) 201.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet.
